  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager",
  "description": "Whassan Nigeria is a fully owned Nigeria Company with over 40 years of experience in industrial catering services.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Project Manager&nbsp;

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking good project manager who is capable of handling 5 to 7 catering project within the South-South and South-West axises.
	The candidate should have knowledge in budgetting, cost control and vast knowledge in food preparation and buffet services.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 5 - 7 years of experience.


Salary
N500,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: cateringjobsnigeria@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Project Manager Job at Whassan Nigeria




        
    

        
        Whassan Nigeria is a fully owned Nigeria Company with over 40 years of experience in industrial catering services.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Project Manager 

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking good project manager who is capable of handling 5 to 7 catering project within the South-South and South-West axises.
	The candidate should have knowledge in budgetting, cost control and vast knowledge in food preparation and buffet services.


Qualifications
     

            
    




	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree with 5 - 7 years of experience.


Salary
N500,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Manager - Outlet Operations",
  "description": "Consulting DCC is a professional consulting firm that provides strategic, operational, recruitment, and advisory services designed to support business growth and improve organizational efficiency. We work closely with clients to understand their unique needs, address operational challenges, and deliver practical, results-driven solutions. Our approach is rooted in professionalism, integrity, and a strong understanding of business processes, enabling us to help organizations strengthen their structures, attract and retain the right talent, make informed decisions, and achieve sustainable performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager - Outlet Operations

Job Locations: Lekki, Ajao-Oshodi, Magboro, Abule egba- Command, Gbagada, Ikeja, Yaba, VI, Ajah, Ojota/Ogudu, Bariga - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Area Operations Manager

Job Summary


	The Business Manager is responsible for the overall leadership, operational excellence, and profitability of assigned outlets.
	The role provides strategic and operational oversight of all business activities, ensuring the achievement of revenue, profitability, customer satisfaction, and people management objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive Business Performance: Achieve sales, revenue, and profitability targets across assigned outlets by executing business strategies.
	Oversee Operations: Ensure efficient day-to-day outlet operations while maintaining high standards of food quality, service, cleanliness, safety, and SOP compliance.
	Lead People: Coach, develop, and manage Outlet teams to build a high-performing, engaged, and accountable workforce.
	Deliver Excellent Customer Experience: Ensure exceptional service standards, promptly resolve customer complaints, and implement initiatives that enhance customer satisfaction and loyalty.
	Manage Financials and Resources: Control labour, food, and operating costs while ensuring effective inventory management, asset protection, and optimal profitability.
	Ensure Compliance: Maintain compliance with company policies, food safety regulations, audit requirements, and statutory standards to minimize operational risks.
	Drive Performance Improvement: Analyze business performance, prepare management reports, and implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency and business growth.


Requirements
Experience:


	Minimum of 5 years of progressive experience in the Quick Service Restaurant (QSR), restaurant, or food service industry, with at least 2 years inmanagement role.
	Proven track record of achieving sales growth, improving profitability, and leading high-performing teams in a fast-paced QSR environment.
	Strong understanding of QSR operational standards, food safety regulations, inventory management, labour scheduling, and customer service excellence.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: career@consultingdcc.com.ng using the Job Position and Preferred Location as the subject of the email (e.g., Business Manager &ndash; Lekki).",

Business Manager - Outlet Operations Job at Consulting DCC




        
    

        
        Consulting DCC is a professional consulting firm that provides strategic, operational, recruitment, and advisory services designed to support business growth and improve organizational efficiency. We work closely with clients to understand their unique needs, address operational challenges, and deliver practical, results-driven solutions. Our approach is rooted in professionalism, integrity, and a strong understanding of business processes, enabling us to help organizations strengthen their structures, attract and retain the right talent, make informed decisions, and achieve sustainable performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Manager - Outlet Operations
     

            
    



Job Locations: Lekki, Ajao-Oshodi, Magboro, Abule egba- Command, Gbagada, Ikeja, Yaba, VI, Ajah, Ojota/Ogudu, Bariga - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Area Operations Manager

Job Summary


	The Business Manager is responsible for the overall leadership, operational excellence, and profitability of assigned outlets.
	The role provides strategic and operational oversight of all business activities, ensuring the achievement of revenue, profitability, customer satisfaction, and people management objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive Business Performance: Achieve sales, revenue, and profitability targets across assigned outlets by executing business strategies.
	Oversee Operations: Ensure efficient day-to-day outlet operations while maintaining high standards of food quality, service, cleanliness, safety, and SOP compliance.
	Lead People: Coach, develop, and manage Outlet teams to build a high-performing, engaged, and accountable workforce.
	Deliver Excellent Customer Experience: Ensure exceptional service standards, promptly resolve customer complaints, and implement initiatives that enhance customer satisfaction and loyalty.
	Manage Financials and Resources: Control labour, food, and operating costs while ensuring effective inventory management, asset protection, and optimal profitability.
	Ensure Compliance: Maintain compliance with company policies, food safety regulations, audit requirements, and statutory standards to minimize operational risks.
	Drive Performance Improvement: Analyze business performance, prepare management reports, and implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency and business growth.


Requirements
Experience:


	Minimum of 5 years of progressive experience in the Quick Service Restaurant (QSR), restaurant, or food service industry, with at least 2 years inmanagement role.
	Proven track record of achieving sales growth, improving profitability, and leading high-performing teams in a fast-paced QSR environment.
	Strong understanding of QSR operational standards, food safety regulations, inventory management, labour scheduling, and customer service excellence.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month. 

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Preferred Location as the subject of the email (e.g., Business Manager – Lekki).    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Multi Skilled Tech Operator",
  "description": "The BBC is an international multimedia broadcaster on radio, TV, online and social networks with a weekly global audience of 320 million. As part of an historic multi-million pound expansion of BBC Africa, the BBC World Service is introducing a wide range of new and exciting language and regional content to serve African and global audiences.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Multi Skilled Tech Operator, Nigeria

Job Requisition ID: 48251
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Purpose of the Role


	The Multi-Skilled Technical Operator enables the delivery of BBC journalism across television, radio, digital and social platforms by combining expertise in video production, live streaming, broadcast operations and production technology support.
	Working as part of an integrated newsroom, the post holder ensures content is delivered efficiently, creatively and to the highest editorial and technical standards while adapting to evolving production technologies and workflows.&nbsp;
	The post holder will support video-led storytelling and digital-first production while maintaining professional broadcast standards.
	They will also provide first-line operational support for production systems and users, escalating specialist technical issues where appropriate.&nbsp;
	This role suits a skilled technical operator confident in a digital studio environment.
	You&rsquo;ll&nbsp;&nbsp;work across studio operations, including sound mixing, vision mixing, lighting, camera work, video editing, and live streaming.&nbsp;
	With training, you&rsquo;ll support all technical areas and assist remote teams with local IT and production systems.


Key Responsibilities and Impact


	Manage day-to-day operations of a digital video production studio, including layout, maintenance, and safety.
	Support editorial teams in creating engaging content for social media and streaming platforms.
	Operate software-based vision mixing tools and apply keying techniques to enhance visual output.
	Mix live and recorded audio, set up microphones, and manage sound equipment to meet production needs.
	Rig, test, and operate studio lighting, cameras (including PTZ), monitors, and prompting devices.
	Coordinate technical issues with local and remote teams to ensure timely resolution and smooth production.
	Develop additional technical competencies through training and operational experience, contributing to a flexible and resilient technical production team.
	Provide basic IT support and act as &ldquo;smart hands&rdquo; for remote engineering tasks, including equipment setup and troubleshooting.


Your Skills and Experience
Essential Criteria:


	Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken, with strong interpersonal abilities.
	Proven experience supporting live television, radio or digital production in a broadcast or multimedia environment.
	Experience operating live production and streaming platforms such as vMix (or equivalent).&nbsp;
	Skilled in sound mixing, microphone setup, and use of radio mics, with awareness of licensing and frequency allocation.
	Competent in studio lighting setup and camera operations, including PTZ and lightweight cameras.
	Editorial awareness and understanding of BBC News priorities, with the ability to work accurately under pressure.
	Demonstrable experience in video acquisition and non-linear editing for broadcast or digital platforms.
	IT knowledge and ability to operate technical equipment, including software-based broadcast systems and network configuration.
	Awareness of health, safety, and security in studio environments, with required levels of hearing and colour vision.&nbsp;

Multi Skilled Tech Operator Job at BBC Nigeria




        
    

        
        The BBC is an international multimedia broadcaster on radio, TV, online and social networks with a weekly global audience of 320 million. As part of an historic multi-million pound expansion of BBC Africa, the BBC World Service is introducing a wide range of new and exciting language and regional content to serve African and global audiences.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Multi Skilled Tech Operator, Nigeria

Job Requisition ID: 48251
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Purpose of the Role
     

            
    




	The Multi-Skilled Technical Operator enables the delivery of BBC journalism across television, radio, digital and social platforms by combining expertise in video production, live streaming, broadcast operations and production technology support.
	Working as part of an integrated newsroom, the post holder ensures content is delivered efficiently, creatively and to the highest editorial and technical standards while adapting to evolving production technologies and workflows. 
	The post holder will support video-led storytelling and digital-first production while maintaining professional broadcast standards.
	They will also provide first-line operational support for production systems and users, escalating specialist technical issues where appropriate. 
	This role suits a skilled technical operator confident in a digital studio environment.
	You’ll  work across studio operations, including sound mixing, vision mixing, lighting, camera work, video editing, and live streaming. 
	With training, you’ll support all technical areas and assist remote teams with local IT and production systems.


Key Responsibilities and Impact


	Manage day-to-day operations of a digital video production studio, including layout, maintenance, and safety.
	Support editorial teams in creating engaging content for social media and streaming platforms.
	Operate software-based vision mixing tools and apply keying techniques to enhance visual output.
	Mix live and recorded audio, set up microphones, and manage sound equipment to meet production needs.
	Rig, test, and operate studio lighting, cameras (including PTZ), monitors, and prompting devices.
	Coordinate technical issues with local and remote teams to ensure timely resolution and smooth production.
	Develop additional technical competencies through training and operational experience, contributing to a flexible and resilient technical production team.
	Provide basic IT support and act as “smart hands” for remote engineering tasks, including equipment setup and troubleshooting.


Your Skills and Experience
Essential Criteria:


	Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken, with strong interpersonal abilities.
	Proven experience supporting live television, radio or digital production in a broadcast or multimedia environment.
	Experience operating live production and streaming platforms such as vMix (or equivalent). 
	Skilled in sound mixing, microphone setup, and use of radio mics, with awareness of licensing and frequency allocation.
	Competent in studio lighting setup and camera operations, including PTZ and lightweight cameras.
	Editorial awareness and understanding of BBC News priorities, with the ability to work accurately under pressure.
	Demonstrable experience in video acquisition and non-linear editing for broadcast or digital platforms.
	IT knowledge and ability to operate technical equipment, including software-based broadcast systems and network configuration.
	Awareness of health, safety, and security in studio environments, with required levels of hearing and colour vision.

  "description": "LD&amp;D Consulting is a project management consulting firm that specialises in turning key projects into success by working collaboratively with clients and key stakeholders. Our specialist project management team consists of seasoned consultants across various industries.

We offer project management consulting, recruiting, Training and Development, HR outsourcing, and payroll services across various industries, including Telecoms, IT, Construction, Transportation, Energy, Sports, Environmental and Health Care, Banking &amp; Finance, Services, and Consulting in both private and public sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager (Real Estate)

Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Are you a results-driven professional with a passion for sales, business development, and building strong client relationships?
	We are looking for an ambitious Business Development Manager to join our growing team and play a key role in driving business growth.


Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong relationships with prospective and existing clients
	Conduct site inspections with clients where required
	Present products and services effectively to potential customers
	Negotiate and close sales to achieve business targets
	Maintain accurate records using CRM tools
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure an excellent customer experience
	Monitor market trends and competitor activities to identify growth opportunities


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree
	2&ndash;4 years of relevant business development or sales experience
	Willingness to travel for site inspections and business development activities
	Excellent communication and negotiation skills
	Strong sales, prospecting, and closing abilities
	Experience with customer relationship management (CRM)
	Knowledge of the real estate market is an advantage.


Benefits&nbsp;
Salary: N300,000 - N400,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: precious@dicaloo.com , using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Development Manager (Real Estate) Job at LD&D Consulting




        
    

        
        LD&D Consulting is a project management consulting firm that specialises in turning key projects into success by working collaboratively with clients and key stakeholders. Our specialist project management team consists of seasoned consultants across various industries.

We offer project management consulting, recruiting, Training and Development, HR outsourcing, and payroll services across various industries, including Telecoms, IT, Construction, Transportation, Energy, Sports, Environmental and Health Care, Banking & Finance, Services, and Consulting in both private and public sectors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager (Real Estate)
     

            
    



Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Are you a results-driven professional with a passion for sales, business development, and building strong client relationships?
	We are looking for an ambitious Business Development Manager to join our growing team and play a key role in driving business growth.


Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong relationships with prospective and existing clients
	Conduct site inspections with clients where required
	Present products and services effectively to potential customers
	Negotiate and close sales to achieve business targets
	Maintain accurate records using CRM tools
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure an excellent customer experience
	Monitor market trends and competitor activities to identify growth opportunities


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree
	2–4 years of relevant business development or sales experience
	Willingness to travel for site inspections and business development activities
	Excellent communication and negotiation skills
	Strong sales, prospecting, and closing abilities
	Experience with customer relationship management (CRM)
	Knowledge of the real estate market is an advantage.


Benefits 
Salary: N300,000 - N400,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] , using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
